rationale: The cited paper is used for core positioning, not just a background list: the 2024 article explicitly frames its contribution as addressing a gap left by prior redemption work such as Dreze and Nunes (2004), which it describes as centered on fixed exchange rates. It is also cited as a direct design precedent in the methods (budget structure in later studies is described as following Dreze and Nunes). This indicates the cited work meaningfully informs both framing and study setup.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the prior loyalty-point redemption line represented by Dreze and Nunes (2004) by shifting from fixed-rate settings to variable-versus-fixed exchange-rate stability and by proposing optimism as the mechanism driving lower redemption under variable rates.
